---
title: Custom Document
format: html
_quarto:
  tests:
    html:
      noErrors: true
      ensureCssRegexMatches:
        - ["Neucha"]
        - ["#375a7f"]
---

## Custom Document

This document is in `appendix/custom/` where `_metadata.yml` sets
`theme: sketchy`. The Neucha font family is unique to sketchy.
